chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.745 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on MA No.11774/2025. 2. For order on MA No.11775/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025 Applicant present in person. ------------------------------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. This Cr. Misc. Application has been filed by the applicant Wahaj Ahmed Siddiqui being aggrieved by the impugned order dated 25.07.2025 passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Karachi Central. It appears that the dispute between the applicant and respondent No.1 arises out of a family matter of the applicant following khula granted by the Family Court and a pending Guardians & Wards case. The accused / respondent No.1 Aneel Khan is apparently the former brother-in-law of the applicant and the other proposed accused are his brother-in-law’s companions. The impugned order passing orders to the concerned police authorities to maintain peace and public tranquility with the observation that the applicant is at liberty to initiate action and / or any complaint in the event of any illegal act or breach of law following the impugned order, in the circumstances, has no defects. As such, the impugned order is sustained and the instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed for the above reasons. J U D G E Asif
